Comment.value: The text JSON import works only when texts are stored in an 1.dimensional array with propertys: id and value
import_mode can be "new" or "update" or "translation" (which means that the text fields are created and new texts only are going to be imported.)
This script is also used for translated texts - using script parameters

Calculation.Text: Case ( GetScriptProperty ( "file_id" )= ""; "" ; GetScriptProperty ( "file_id" )) // some text imports may use source_item_type - sprig story for example

Comment.value: Text status can either be "In progress" or "Approved" and depends on the localisation stage
Change 2022-02-02 - could be a possible error with patterncount above

Calculation.Text: Case ( JSONGetElement ( $importedTextJSON ;"[" & $i & "]value") = ""; JSONGetElement ( $importedTextJSON ;"[" & $i & "]text") ; JSONGetElement ( $importedTextJSON ;"[" & $i & "]value") ) // text have key = "value" in normal json and "text" in subtitles json - really bad...

Comment.value: Search original key from clone (global template texts), title_id and localisation_code
Search original key, title_id and localisation_code

Calculation.Text: Get(foundCount) = 0 Or (FAT Text::Package id ≠ $package_id And FAT Text::Package id ≠ "")

Comment.value: The translated text does not match any original text. Maybe block is removed after translation.

Calculation.Text: "Error. Cannot find orginial text for this translation"

Comment.value: Maybe record busy with another user
create a new record whether mode is new or update
Error 504 = Value in field is not unique, as required in validation entry options
Don't change "Imported text" since it is used when deleting texts to make sure we don't delete wrong texts.
